summary: Comprehensive testing of new member management features: Remove member from group, Move member between groups, and Admin UI with Move/Remove buttons. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/groups/{group_id}/members - returns members using group_ids array (not singular group_id)
DELETE /api/groups/{group_id}/members/{user_id} - removes member from group without deleting account
Admin guard: removing admin user returns 403 with 'Cannot remove admin from groups'
Admin guard: moving admin user returns 403 with 'Cannot move admin between groups'
After removal: user appears in /api/users/unassigned if they have no remaining groups
After move: user only appears in target group's member list, not source
Move to same group returns 400 error
Admin Panel > Group tab: expanded members list shows Move and Remove buttons for non-admin members
Admin Panel > Group tab: admin members show 'admin' badge but NO Move/Remove buttons
Remove confirmation dialog appears with correct title and member name
Move dialog appears with group dropdown for target selection
Multi-group join via Settings 'Join Another Group' endpoint works
critical_code_review_comments: Backend groups.py lines 150-184: remove_member_from_group correctly pulls group from group_ids array and updates primary group_id
Backend groups.py lines 187-229: move_member_to_group atomically removes from source and adds to target
Backend groups.py line 143: get_group_members correctly queries 'group_ids' (array) instead of 'group_id' (singular)
Frontend Admin.jsx lines 693-718: Move/Remove buttons only render for non-admin members (m.role !== 'admin')
Frontend Admin.jsx lines 742-786: Remove and Move dialogs with proper confirmation flow
Frontend api.js lines 265-266: removeMember and moveMember API methods correctly implemented

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 core tests passed, 4 test setup issues due to registration response format)

seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing: test_remove_*, test_move_*, test_same_*, test_notingroup_*, test_multigroup_*. john.test2 was moved and removed during testing, then re-assigned to Demo Group.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Member management features fully tested. Two groups exist: 'The Room Demo Group' (DEMO2026) with 8+ members and 'Wednesday Bible Study' (XNQKH4YX) with 0 members. Admin user (Teacher) is protected from Move/Remove actions. Test users with 'test_' prefix in email can be cleaned up. The registration endpoint returns {user_id, group_id, group_name} not {user: {id}}.

remove_member.unassigned_list: WORKING - user appears in unassigned after removal

move_member.source_removal: WORKING - user removed from source group
move_member.target_addition: WORKING - user added to target group

admin_ui.move_button_for_members: WORKING - 7 Move buttons for non-admin members
admin_ui.remove_button_for_members: WORKING - 7 Remove buttons for non-admin members
admin_ui.admin_protection: WORKING - admin member shows badge but no Move/Remove buttons
admin_ui.remove_dialog: WORKING - shows confirmation with member name
admin_ui.move_dialog: WORKING - shows group dropdown for target selection
